message:
refactor: apply clippy lint fixes across conformance tests and core modules

Idiomatic Rust improvements flagged by clippy:

Conformance tests:
  - bench/report.rs: use io::Error::other() instead of
    io::Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...) (clippy::map_err_ignore)
  - bench/report.rs: use as_deref() instead of
    .as_ref().map(String::as_str) for Option<String> to &str conversion
  - report.rs: same io::Error::other() modernization
  - budget.rs: replace manual indexing loop with enumerate().take(n) to
    avoid clippy::needless_range_loop and improve readability
  - negative.rs: simplify Ok(value) if value == 42 to Ok(42) pattern match
  - negative.rs: replace while let Some(_) with while ... .is_some()
    (clippy::while_let_on_iterator)
  - outcome.rs: replace !result.is_err() with result.is_ok() and
    !result.is_ok() with result.is_err() (clippy::double_negation)

Core modules:
  - no_aliasing_proof.rs: use u64::from(i) instead of i as u64 to
    avoid clippy::cast_lossless (explicit lossless widening)
  - trace/minimizer.rs: add #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] for
    intentional u64-to-f64 ratio calculations in test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
